hero.headingLine1: WHAT ARE YOU GETTING FROM SOCIAL MEDIA?
hero.headingLine2: WHAT IS IT GETTING FROM YOU?
hero.body1: Most of us use it out of habit more than intention. And while social media can connect people, the platforms aren't designed around your wellbeing. They're built around your attention, and they're very good at keeping it.
hero.body2: The consequences are hard to measure, but easy to feel.
hero.body3: This project started with one person deleting accounts one by one, and finding that life quietly got better. It's grown into a small community of people making the same experiment, and we aim to help as many people as we can.
hero.body4: Take the quiz if you're curious where you stand. Make a pledge if you're ready to try something different.

kidsCallout.heading: What's next
kidsCallout.card1Body: Read our summary of research findings on how algorithm-driven social media and device dependency affect mental health, attention, and civic life.
kidsCallout.card2Body: Practical strategies for reducing your screen time, changing your environment, and making the change stick.
kidsCallout.card3Body: Even if we were heavily influenced, most adults chose to join social media. Kids today were born into it. The research on how it's reshaping their brains and mental health is alarming, and everyone who has young people in their lives should know it.
kidsCallout.card3Cta: Read what the research says about kids

pledge.heading: Take the 10-Day Pledge
pledge.questionLabel: What do you pledge to do for the next 10 days?
pledge.legend: Pledge to free yourself from social media
pledge.action1Subtitle: Set limits on daily social media use
pledge.action3Subtitle: Permanently delete one or more accounts
pledge.emailHelp: We'll send you a confirmation link. Your pledge won't count until you click it. Your email will never be shared.
pledge.newsletterHelp: We don't have a newsletter right now, but we might someday. Check this if you'd be open to updates from us. No spam, and we won't contact you for any other reason.
pledge.successSentTo: We sent a confirmation link to:
pledge.successWarningHeading: Your pledge won't count until you click the link.
pledge.successWarningBody: Can't find it? Check your spam or junk folder before requesting a new one.
pledge.sidebarGuideHeading: Not sure what to do next?
pledge.sidebarGuideBody: Our guide covers practical strategies for getting through the first two weeks, changing your environment, and staying off for good.
pledge.sidebarDisclaimer: Links point to official platform documentation. Verify steps on each platform, as processes may change.

footer.tagline: A community project encouraging intentional choices about social media and screen time.
footer.noCookies: This site uses one cookie to remember your language preference. No tracking, no data collection.
